latest_articles.title: Pre-election period starts in Latvia with a wary eye on AI influence
latest_articles.summary: On Saturday, June 6th, the official pre-election campaign period for the 15th Saeima elections begins in Latvia, which will last until election day itself – October 3rd. The pre-election period runs for 120 days.
